# claudeplatform_service_account_workspace (Resource)

Explicit membership of a service account in a workspace. Required before a federation rule can target the service account in that workspace (every service account is implicitly a member of the organization's default workspace only). Requires an org:admin OAuth token. Import with "service_account_id/workspace_id".

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "claudeplatform_workspace" "ml_team" {
  name = "ml-team"
}

resource "claudeplatform_service_account" "ci" {
  name = "github-actions-ci"
}

resource "claudeplatform_service_account_workspace" "ci_ml_team" {
  service_account_id = claudeplatform_service_account.ci.id
  workspace_id       = claudeplatform_workspace.ml_team.id
  workspace_role     = "workspace_developer"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `service_account_id` (String) Service account ID (svac_...).
- `workspace_id` (String) Workspace ID (wrkspc_...).

### Optional

- `workspace_role` (String) Role the service account holds in the workspace.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import using "service_account_id/workspace_id".
terraform import claudeplatform_service_account_workspace.ci_ml_team svac_01MnOPqrs321/wrkspc_01WgQMyXabc123
```
